title: Mock Exam File
description: Schema for individual exam JSON files under exams/<cert-id>/exam-NN.json

questions.description: All questions in this exam. 40–100 items; typically 45–60.

id.description: Unique machine-readable exam ID. Format: <cert-code>-exam-<NN>. Example: 'dea-exam-01', 'sfspca-exam-02'.

certification.description: Matches the parent folder name and the catalog certification id. Kebab-case. Example: 'data-engineer-associate'.

certificationName.description: Full human-readable certification name. Example: 'Databricks Certified Data Engineer Associate'.

title.description: Exam title in the format '<CODE>-<N>: <Topic Description>'. Code is uppercase, e.g. 'DBX-DEA-1: Lakehouse Fundamentals and Delta Lake' or 'SF-SPCA-1: Architecture and Storage'.

version.description: Semantic version string. Use '1.0' for new exams.

timeLimit.description: Allotted time in minutes. Must match the real certification's time limit.

passingScore.description: Passing percentage (0–100). Must match the official certification passing score — almost always 70.

totalQuestions.description: Must exactly equal the length of the questions array.

domains.description: Domain breakdown for this exam. Weights must sum to exactly 100. All domain IDs must exist in catalog.json domainGroups.

difficulty.description: Overall exam difficulty. Most exams are 'medium'.

status.description: Availability status. New exams must be 'available'.

last_audited.description: Optional ISO audit date for the most recent human or automation review.

DomainWeight.description: A topic domain covered in this exam, with its relative weighting.

id.description: Kebab-case domain ID. Must exist in one of catalog.json's domainGroups.domains arrays. Cross-validated at runtime by the validator script.

name.description: Human-readable domain name shown in results breakdown.

weight.description: Percentage weight of this domain. All weights in the exam's domains array must sum to exactly 100.

id.description: Question ID. Sequential: 'q01', 'q02', … 'q45'. Must be unique within the exam.

domain.description: Domain this question tests. Must match a domain id in meta.domains AND exist in catalog.json domainGroups.

type.description: Question type. 'single' = exactly one correct option. 'multiple' = two or more. Derivable from options[].correct count but retained for validation. Stem of multiple-select must end with '(Select TWO)' etc.

difficulty.description: Question difficulty. Target distribution per exam: ~25% easy, ~50% medium, ~25% hard.

stem.description: The question text. Must be at least 20 characters.

options.description: Answer options. 4–6 items. Each carries its own correctness flag and explanation. Frontend assigns A/B/C/D display labels at render time — option IDs are stable unique identifiers.

reference.description: Markdown link or short string naming the documentation section this question tests.

Option.description: A single answer option (schema v2). Carries correctness and per-option explanation.

id.description: Stable unique option ID. Format: q{NN}a{N} — question ID + 'a' + 1-based index. Example: 'q01a1', 'q01a2'. Frontend assigns A/B/C/D display labels independently at render time.

text.description: Option text. Complete, unambiguous statement. Must not contain 'All of the above', 'None of the above', or 'Both A and B'.

correct.description: True if this option is a correct answer to the question.

explanation.description: Why this option is correct or incorrect in the context of this question. May be empty for legacy questions with single-block explanations.
